section_miscategorizations.text: He reports that his left knee does not hurt and feels unstable.
section_miscategorizations.reason: The sentence is internally contradictory (no pain yet unstable) and likely intended to refer to the right knee; however, it is still symptom history and belongs in HPI. This is a content accuracy issue rather than a section miscategorization.

section_miscategorizations.text: ibuprofen 800mg twice daily as needed for the left knee.
